response: The Trust & Safety team sent an email announcing an update to the platform’s content moderation policy focused on regulating AI-generated content, outlining three new rules that will launch with enforcement starting June 1: AI-generated images must be labeled, deepfakes are prohibited, and AI-assisted text is allowed only if it discloses its use of AI. To support full compliance with the new policy, the Trust & Safety team is currently preparing required training materials for all relevant teams to review ahead of the June 1 enforcement start date.
